summary: List all hook scripts to understand the pattern
Wait for test completion and get final summary
Run ruff linter on new hook script
Type check the new hook script
Test the hook script with sample input
Check if dashboard.html exists in the package
Check if index.html exists in project root
Wait longer for test completion and retrieve final results
Check git diff on subagent_stop.py for unwanted additions
Check pytest collection to see what's failing
Check end of pytest collection output for error details
Remove test file for removed backfill_from_transcript function
Run the two fixed tests to verify they pass
Run mypy on changed source files
Run ruff linter and formatter on source files
Check git status to see all modified files
Run linting, formatting, and type checking on modified files
Run tests to verify changes don't break existing functionality
Check the end of the test output for final results
Search for test summary with passed count
Check total lines and show final 100 lines of test output
Check the very last line for test completion status
Run schema tests specifically to verify migrations work
